summary: Testing iteration 18: 4 new UI/backend fixes. Backend: 9/9 tests PASSED (consolidated pending-locations endpoint returns correct structure). Frontend: All features verified via screenshots - Daily Progress NOT shown, Pending Locations view renders correctly, Empty Bins view works, report tables have sticky headers with whitespace-nowrap. 7 summary cards code confirmed at line 910 (lg:grid-cols-7). Database is empty so summary cards don't appear (no totals data).

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented. Frontend falls back to empty state gracefully.

critical_code_review_comments: Line 252: SortableHeader has `whitespace-nowrap` class - headers won't wrap to multiple lines
Line 910-918: 7 summary cards use `lg:grid-cols-7` grid layout (Stock Qty, Stock Value, Physical Qty, Physical Value, Diff Qty, Diff Value, Accuracy)
Lines 988, 1118, 1216, 1362, 1509, 1816: All report tables have `sticky top-0 z-10` on thead
Line 928: PendingLocationsView renders for 'pending-locations' report type
GET /api/portal/reports/consolidated/{client_id}/pending-locations returns {summary, completed, empty_bins, pending} - CORRECT
Daily Progress section: State declared but NOT rendered in UI - CORRECT (removed as requested)
PendingLocationsView has its own summary cards: Total Expected, Completed, Empty Bins, Pending, Completion + progress bar
seed_data_creation: None - database is empty. Tests verified structural correctness and no-crash behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested 4 fixes: 1) Daily Progress removed - PASS (state exists but not rendered), 2) 7 summary cards - code verified at line 910 with lg:grid-cols-7 (not displayed due to empty DB), 3) Header alignment whitespace-nowrap - PASS at line 252, 4) Consolidated pending-locations endpoint - PASS returns correct structure. Database was cleared so most tests verified no-crash behavior with empty data. Backend endpoint /reports/consolidated/{client}/empty-bins returns 404 (not implemented for consolidated view).
